text: The application should be connected to the GPS device.
The product shall achieve a 98% uptime. The product shall not fail more than 2% of the available online time.
Velkat staff will be available for phone support between 7am-7pm M-F to provide technical support to the Izogn administrators.
ABS shall handle all expected and unexpected errors in ways that prevent loss in information and long downtime period.
The system shall accommodate large data items without fault.
IzognMovies shall meet the licensing requirements set forth by the appropriate organizations in order to stream African movies.
The website will comply with W3C standards.

The intranet pages should display appropriately in all resolutions from 800x600 and higher. The display of all the pages will be correct in 95% of the resolutions prior to implementation. The remaining 5% will be corrected within a week of notification of the incorrect display.
The product shall comply with City of Chicago Application Development Guide Framework.Application Development Framework will provide structured Graphical User Interface.
The system shall be able to display a menu at all times to facilitate manual order taking should the need arise.
The system shall use IBM and CCR branding standards. The interface must have one IBM logo and one CCR logo.
The website shall be attractive to all audiences. The website shall appear to be fun and the colors should be bright and vibrant.
Maintenance releases will be offered to customers once a year. The releases shall take no longer than 5 minutes for 80% of the customer base to install.
New System version releases shall be released at the beginning of each NFL season.
A secondary database will be used to store historical statistics and data.
The System shall not require additional third party licenses resulting in royalty fees.
The System shall utilize currently owned computer equipment.

The product must work with most database management systems (DBMS) on the market whether the DBMS is colocated with the product on the same machine or is located on a different machine on the computer network.
The product will be available for licensing as a one-server two-five servers or five-or-more servers license.
The system should be able to manage all the information incoming from the database and the catalogue.
The system should have to keep the location where the doughnut will be send.
The website should use Flash to provide animation on the home page.
No lead evaluation will complete in a time period longer than 25 seconds for 97% of all leads processed.
Recreation of Inventory Quantity Adjustment for the period of previous 30 days shall take no more than 30min.
System shall let administrators generate unique pre-paid pins in under 2 minutes and generate an Excel file with the generated PINs.
The Disputes application shall support 350 concurrent users without any degradation of performance in the application.
The product shall provide Multi-threading and Load Balancing.The product shall provide multi-threading technology as well as load balancing to overcome data load spikes and traffic.
The search for the preferred repair facility shall take no longer than 8 seconds. The preferred repair facility is returned within 8 seconds
The Web interface should be compatible with standards in order to be usable via all major Web browsers in a wide variety of environments.
The system will support mobile users in some way.
The product shall be capable of handling the existing 1000 users. This number is expected to grow 5 times within the next year.
The website shall be capable of supporting 100 000 customers.
Only adjusters can request recycled parts audit reports. No users without an adjuster role shall request recycled parts audits.
Only authorized personnel can access customer records in the database.
Only authorized personnel can access sales information.
Only authorized users shall have access to students92 personal information.
Only registered customers can purchase streaming movies.
The Disputes application shall manipulate and view business data. Users will not have direct access to data files or databases.
The product shall ensure that it can only be accessed by authorized users. The product will be able to distinguish between authorized and unauthorized users in all access attempts
The product shall have security.The product shall provide authentication and authorization.
The system shall have basic data integrity checking to reduce the possibility of incorrect or invalid data being introduced.
The system shall use secure sockets in all transactions that include any confidential customer information.
The website shall prevent its data from being corrupted when incorrect data is entered in.
Users shall be required to log into the system for all operations except the operations on the login page.
All of the users shall be able to use the system after one day of training.

An employee will be able to successfully use the product within a few minutes. After informally navigating the product for less than 15 minutes users shall be able to successfully setup meetings and reserve conference rooms.
It should not take more than 120 seconds for a new user to register for an account.
The list of dispute cases that are displayed after a search is performed must be color coded for easy identification of dispute cases based upon the dispute case status.
The product shall be easy to learn by Adjusters and Collision Estimators. The product shall be learned with two days onsite training
The product shall use symbols and words that are naturally understandable by users familiar with websites
The system shall provide a digital image for each product in the product catalog.
The user interface of the system should be very user friendly.
Users shall feel satisfied using the product. 85% of all users will be satisfied with the product.
